Configuration file for the data pipeline service.

Contact: ops-team@example.com
Phone: +1-555-9999

The service connects to the upstream endpoint using the following settings:
BEARER = "sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456"
BASE_URL = "https://api.example.com/v1"

For support contact: support@example.com
Phone: +1-555-1234
